site.name: Orion
site.description: Premium warehouse automation, engineered and built in the UK.

global.address: Number 1 Fontwell Avenue, Fontwell, Chichester, PO20 3RU

hero.eyebrow: The chaos is the cost. We engineer it out.
hero.lead: Helix is a modular sortation system that runs inside the building you already have. No capital outlay. Flexible finance from as little as £1,000 a month. Designed, built, installed and supported in the UK.

thesis.lead: Most warehouse automation pitches start with the capital. We don't. We start with the labour line you're already paying.
thesis.body:
A typical mid-volume operation runs the equivalent of 8–12 Helix sorters' worth of manual sortation. The agency rates, the overtime, the seasonal scramble — that's where your money goes today. Helix takes most of it back, and the monthly finance comes out of money you're already spending.

It doesn't cost you money. It saves you money. The numbers are why operators move.

cards.title: Operating expense, not capital
cards.desc: Flexible finance from £1,000 a month on a 60-month agreement. No CAPEX line. Subject to spec and credit.

cards.title: Pays for itself by Q1
cards.desc: Most sites cover the monthly cost through reduced agency labour inside the first quarter of operation.

cards.title: Under one roof, in the UK
cards.desc: Six engineering disciplines. 4-week typical install. UK-engineered, UK-supported, UK-accountable.

operation.lead: Every Helix system ships with the same live operational view. Throughput, dispatch SLA, system health, predictive alerts. Visible from any browser, no integration project required. This is what your warehouse looks like running on Helix today.
operation.footBody: The same view is included with every Helix system from day one — no separate licence, no integration cost. This is the foundation; an intelligence layer is in development.

items.title: Sorting 18,400 parcels per hour without extending the building.
items.quote: Helix paid for itself in agency cost reductions inside the first quarter. We're now planning the second installation.

items.title: Two shifts collapsed into one with the same headcount.
Pallet handling rebuilt around a 4-week install window.

roof.lead1: Most automation suppliers hold one or two of these capabilities. Orion connects all six into a single delivery — mechanical to software, factory floor to control room.
roof.lead2: It's why a Helix system can be quoted, built, installed and supported by the same company. Shorter lines, faster decisions, one accountable team.

disciplines.title: Mechanical engineering
disciplines.desc: Machines designed around real warehouse constraints.

disciplines.title: PLC & controls
disciplines.desc: The control layer that makes the system executable.

disciplines.title: Software engineering
disciplines.desc: The reporting layer your operators see each shift.

disciplines.title: Operational know-how
disciplines.desc: Built by people who know peak, downtime and 3am.

cta.lead: A short site visit from one of our engineers. We measure your floor, study your throughput pattern, and send a costed proposal and monthly finance quote within the week. No commitment, no obligation.
